_comment: EXAMPLE / STARTER config — copy to production.config.json and replace the __STILL_FILL__ values (broker info, canonical address, analytics/form). Known demo values are pre-filled. This file itself is NOT used by the build (build.py reads production.config.json).

tokens.broker_name: __STILL_FILL__ (eXp sponsoring broker legal name — from broker)
tokens.broker_jurisdiction: Licensed by the Louisiana Real Estate Commission

_token_notes.business_name: Exact licensed trade name as it must appear (CR-003). Demo uses 'Carrie Billeaud, Realtor'.
_token_notes.address: Canonical office/mailing address once Carrie confirms (demo intentionally omitted it).
_token_notes.license_number: Carrie's LREC license number (CR-003 broker-advertising disclosure).
_token_notes.broker_phone: Broker-OWNED telephone, required conspicuously by LREC (CR-003).
_token_notes.broker_jurisdiction: Regulatory jurisdiction line (pre-filled, confirm exact wording with broker).
_token_notes.ga4_id: GA4 measurement ID (G-XXXXXXX). GA4 snippet injected only when set and not __FILL__.
_token_notes.gsc_verification: Google Search Console verification token (google-site-verification meta).

flags._note: strip_noindex is the LAST switch flipped at launch. false => pages keep noindex AND robots.txt emits Disallow: / so a pre-launch/staging deploy stays private (CR-002). include_audit stays false; audit pages never ship to production.

nap_replacements.note: schema telephone (E.164-ish). Replaced before the bare display number so it is not partially matched.
tel: hrefs (header CTA, sticky-call, in-body call buttons).
rewrites schema url/@id and search-form hosts from the eXp host to the canonical host (CR-008).
